advice.intro: 5 des ensembles de 2 à 3 documents liés. Les questions testent votre capacité à comprendre chaque document et à croiser les informations entre elles.
advice.strategy: Lisez d'abord les questions, repérez les mots-clés, puis cherchez les réponses dans les documents. Pour les questions qui croisent deux documents, vérifiez les deux avant de répondre.

traps.label: Source incorrecte
traps.example: L'information est vraie dans le document B mais la question porte sur le document A.

traps.label: Paraphrase trompeuse
traps.example: "complimentary" dans le texte correspond à "free" dans l'option.

traps.label: Réponse partielle
traps.example: Choisir une réponse vraie dans un seul document quand la question exige de croiser les deux.

traps.label: Chiffres et dates
traps.example: Plusieurs dates ou montants mentionnés. Choisis celui qui répond précisément à la question.

documents.title: Job Opening — Marketing Coordinator
documents.text:
Bright Media is seeking a Marketing Coordinator to join our Chicago team.

Responsibilities:
• Manage social media channels
• Coordinate marketing campaigns
• Prepare monthly performance reports

Requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field
• Minimum 2 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite

Salary: $45,000–$55,000/year
Benefits: Health insurance, 401(k), 15 days paid vacation

Send resume and cover letter to: jobs@brightmedia.com
Deadline: March 20

documents.title: Application — Sarah Kim
documents.text:
From: sarah.kim@email.com
To: jobs@brightmedia.com
Date: March 15
Subject: Marketing Coordinator Application

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Marketing Coordinator position. I hold a Bachelor's degree in Communications and have three years of experience managing social media for a retail brand. I am proficient in Adobe Creative Suite and consistently exceeded campaign targets by 20%.

Please find my resume attached. I am available for an interview at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Sarah Kim

questions.text: What position is Bright Media advertising?

explanation.correct: Le titre de l'annonce est clairement « Marketing Coordinator ».

distractors.A: La gestion des réseaux sociaux est une tâche du poste, pas le titre.
distractors.C: Non mentionné dans l'annonce.

questions.text: What is the application deadline?

explanation.correct: L'annonce précise « Deadline: March 20 ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: C'est la date à laquelle Sarah Kim a envoyé son email.

questions.text: What is the minimum experience required for the position?

explanation.correct: L'annonce indique « Minimum 2 years of relevant experience ».

distractors.A: Inférieur à l'exigence.
distractors.C: C'est l'expérience de Sarah Kim, pas l'exigence minimale.

questions.text: What can be inferred about Sarah Kim's qualifications?
options: (B) She does not have enough experience.
(C) She meets all the stated requirements.
(D) She is not proficient in the required software.

explanation.correct: Elle a un Bachelor's degree (≥ requis), 3 ans d'expérience (≥ 2 requis) et maîtrise Adobe Creative Suite.

distractors.A: Elle a un Bachelor's degree en Communications.
distractors.B: Elle a 3 ans d'expérience, soit plus que les 2 ans requis.
distractors.D: Elle mentionne explicitement sa maîtrise d'Adobe Creative Suite.

documents.title: Office Renovation — Staff Notice
documents.text:
To: All Staff
From: Facilities Department
Date: April 2
Subject: Temporary Office Relocation

Due to planned renovations on floors 3 and 4, all employees on these floors will be relocated to the 6th floor conference rooms from April 10 to April 24.

Please take all personal belongings and essential equipment before April 9. Storage boxes will be available from the reception desk.

We apologize for any inconvenience. For questions, contact facilities@haltongroup.com.

documents.title: Re: Office Renovation — James Patel
documents.text:
From: james.patel@haltongroup.com
To: facilities@haltongroup.com
Date: April 3
Subject: Re: Office Renovation

Hello,

Thank you for the notice. I work on the 3rd floor and have a few questions:

1. Will workstations be available on the 6th floor, or should I bring my laptop?
2. Is there a parking area accessible during the renovation?

Also, I am traveling on April 9 and may not be able to clear my desk in time. Is there a way to arrange early access on April 8?

Thank you,
James Patel

questions.text: Which floors will be renovated?

explanation.correct: Le mémo mentionne explicitement « floors 3 and 4 ».

distractors.A: Le 2ème étage n'est pas concerné.
distractors.C: Le 5ème étage n'est pas mentionné.
distractors.D: Le 6ème étage est la destination temporaire, pas la zone rénovée.

questions.text: Where will relocated employees work during the renovation?

explanation.correct: Le mémo indique « relocated to the 6th floor conference rooms ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

questions.text: Why does James Patel request early access on April 8?
options: (A) He wants to help colleagues move.
(B) He will be traveling on April 9.
(C) His office is on the 4th floor.
(D) He needs to pick up storage boxes.

explanation.correct: Il écrit « I am traveling on April 9 and may not be able to clear my desk in time ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Il précise qu'il est au 3ème étage.
distractors.D: Les boîtes sont disponibles à la réception et ce n'est pas la raison de sa demande.

questions.text: What is TRUE about the renovation schedule?
options: (A) It will last for two weeks.
(C) Employees must clear their desks by April 10.
(D) It affects all floors of the building.

explanation.correct: La rénovation dure du 10 au 24 avril inclus — exactement deux semaines.

distractors.B: Le mémo est daté du 2 avril, mais la rénovation commence le 10.
distractors.C: Les employés doivent libérer leur bureau avant le 9 avril, pas le 10.
distractors.D: Seuls les étages 3 et 4 sont concernés.

documents.title: Q2 Review Meeting Invitation
documents.text:
From: linda.chen@nexatech.com
To: project-team@nexatech.com
Date: May 5
Subject: Q2 Review Meeting — May 12

Hi everyone,

I'd like to schedule our Q2 review meeting on Wednesday, May 12, at 2:00 PM in Conference Room B.

Agenda:
• Q2 sales results (Linda Chen)
• Client feedback summary (Tom Harris)
• Q3 planning overview (all)

Please confirm attendance by May 9. If you cannot attend in person, a video link will be shared. Light refreshments will be provided.

Best,
Linda

documents.title: Conference Room B — May Bookings
documents.text:
CONFERENCE ROOM B — MAY BOOKINGS

May 8  (Mon): 10:00–11:30  Product Team Sync
May 10 (Wed): 14:00–15:00  HR Onboarding Session
May 12 (Wed): 09:00–10:00  Board Call [reserved]
              14:00–16:00  Q2 Review Meeting [reserved]
May 15 (Fri): 11:00–12:00  Client Demo
May 19 (Tue): All-day training — room unavailable

Bookings: contact reception@nexatech.com

questions.text: What time is the Q2 review meeting scheduled to begin?

explanation.correct: L'email et le planning indiquent 14:00 (2:00 PM) pour la réunion Q2.

distractors.A: C'est l'heure du Board Call le même jour.
distractors.B: Non mentionné pour cette réunion.
distractors.D: C'est l'heure de fin de la réunion, pas le début.

questions.text: Who is responsible for presenting the client feedback summary?

explanation.correct: L'agenda précise « Client feedback summary (Tom Harris) ».

distractors.A: Linda Chen présente les résultats Q2.
distractors.C: Toute l'équipe participe à la planification Q3, pas au feedback client.

questions.text: By what date must attendees confirm their attendance?

explanation.correct: L'email indique « Please confirm attendance by May 9 ».

distractors.A: C'est la date d'envoi de l'email.
distractors.B: C'est la date du premier événement dans le planning.
distractors.D: C'est la date de la réunion elle-même.

questions.text: What does the room schedule indicate about May 19?
options: (B) The room is unavailable all day.
(C) A product team meeting is scheduled.
(D) The Q2 review will be held that day.

explanation.correct: Le planning indique « All-day training — room unavailable » pour le 19 mai.

distractors.A: Le client demo est le 15 mai.
distractors.C: La réunion produit est le 8 mai.
distractors.D: La réunion Q2 est le 12 mai.

documents.title: Building Maintenance Policy Update
documents.text:
PINEWOOD TOWERS — MAINTENANCE NOTICE

Effective June 1, all maintenance requests must be submitted through the online portal at pinewoodtowers.com/maintenance or via the Pinewood App.

Phone requests will no longer be accepted.

For urgent issues (water leaks, heating failures, electrical faults), use the Priority Request option. A technician will respond within 2 hours.

Standard requests will be processed within 3–5 business days.

For portal access questions, contact the building office: office@pinewoodtowers.com

documents.title: Maintenance Request — Unit 14B
documents.text:
MAINTENANCE REQUEST FORM
Submitted via: Pinewood App
Date: June 4
Unit: 14B
Resident: Ms. Angela Ross

Issue type: Standard
Description: The kitchen faucet has been dripping for several days. Water pressure in the bathroom is also lower than usual.

Preferred access time: Weekday mornings (9 AM – 12 PM)
Contact: a.ross@email.com / 555-0182

Status: Submitted — awaiting assignment

questions.text: How must maintenance requests be submitted starting June 1?
options: (B) Via the online portal or the Pinewood App
(D) By email to the management team

explanation.correct: L'avis indique que les demandes doivent être soumises via le portail en ligne ou l'application Pinewood.

distractors.A: L'avis précise que les demandes par téléphone ne seront plus acceptées.
distractors.C: Non mentionné comme méthode de soumission.

questions.text: How long does a standard maintenance request typically take?

explanation.correct: L'avis indique « Standard requests will be processed within 3–5 business days ».

distractors.A: C'est le délai de réponse pour les urgences (Priority Request).
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

questions.text: How did Ms. Ross submit her maintenance request?

explanation.correct: Le formulaire indique « Submitted via: Pinewood App ».

distractors.A: Les demandes par téléphone ne sont plus acceptées.
distractors.B: Non indiqué.

questions.text: What issue did Ms. Ross report?
options: (A) A water leak and an electrical fault
(C) A dripping faucet and low water pressure
(D) A broken faucet and a flooded bathroom

explanation.correct: Elle signale « kitchen faucet dripping » et « lower water pressure in the bathroom ».

distractors.A: Une fuite d'eau et une panne électrique seraient des urgences; ce n'est pas ce qu'elle décrit.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.
distractors.D: Le robinet goutte mais n'est pas cassé; la salle de bain n'est pas inondée.

documents.title: Head Chef — The Riverside Grill
documents.text:
The Riverside Grill is looking for an experienced Head Chef to lead our kitchen team.

Requirements:
• 5+ years of professional kitchen experience
• Proven leadership and team management skills
• Expertise in Mediterranean and French cuisine
• Culinary degree or equivalent certification preferred

Responsibilities:
• Design seasonal menus
• Supervise kitchen staff
• Ensure food quality and hygiene standards

Schedule: Tuesday to Sunday, evenings
Salary: Competitive, based on experience
Contact: hr@riversidegrill.com

documents.title: Application Letter — Marc Dubois
documents.text:
Marc Dubois
14 Maple Street, Lyon
m.dubois@email.com

April 18

Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Head Chef position at The Riverside Grill. I have worked in professional kitchens for seven years, most recently as Sous Chef at Café Mistral in Lyon, where I specialized in Mediterranean cuisine.

I hold a Culinary Arts diploma from the Institut Paul Bocuse and have led a team of eight kitchen staff. I am particularly proud of having redesigned the seasonal menu, which increased repeat customer visits by 30%.

I am available for a tasting session or interview at your convenience.

Sincerely,
Marc Dubois

questions.text: What cuisine expertise is required for the Head Chef position?

explanation.correct: L'annonce mentionne « Expertise in Mediterranean and French cuisine ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.
distractors.D: Seule la cuisine française est mentionnée, pas la japonaise.

questions.text: What was Marc Dubois's most recent position?
options: (A) Head Chef at The Riverside Grill
(B) Chef Instructor at Institut Paul Bocuse

explanation.correct: Il indique avoir été « Sous Chef at Café Mistral in Lyon ».

distractors.A: C'est le poste pour lequel il postule.
distractors.B: L'Institut Paul Bocuse est l'école dont il est diplômé, pas son employeur.

questions.text: How does Marc Dubois meet the experience requirement?
options: (A) He has exactly 5 years of experience.
(B) He has 7 years of professional experience.
(D) He managed a restaurant for 3 years.

explanation.correct: Sa lettre indique « seven years » d'expérience, ce qui dépasse les 5 ans requis.

distractors.A: Il a 7 ans, pas exactement 5.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.

questions.text: What achievement does Marc Dubois highlight in his letter?
options: (C) Increasing repeat customer visits by redesigning the menu

explanation.correct: Il mentionne avoir redessiné le menu saisonnier, augmentant les visites clients de 30%.

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.
distractors.D: Son équipe était de 8 personnes, pas 20.

documents.title: BrewMaster Pro 3000 — Coffee Maker
documents.text:
BrewMaster Pro 3000 — The perfect coffee maker for home and office.

• 12-cup capacity
• Programmable 24-hour timer
• Built-in grinder with 5 coarseness settings
• Keep-warm function (up to 2 hours)
• Compatible with ground coffee and whole beans
• 2-year manufacturer warranty

Available in: Black, Silver, and Red
Retail price: $129.99
Free shipping on orders over $100

Order at brewmasterpro.com or at selected retailers.

documents.title: Customer Review — Jane M.
documents.text:
★★★★☆ (4/5)
Reviewer: Jane M. — Verified Purchase
Date: February 10

I purchased the BrewMaster Pro 3000 in Silver last month. The grinder is excellent and the programmable timer is a lifesaver in the mornings. Coffee quality is noticeably better than my previous machine.

However, the keep-warm function stops after about 90 minutes, not the 2 hours advertised. I contacted customer service, and they acknowledged this is a known issue with some units.

Overall, a great machine — but check for this issue before your warranty expires.

questions.text: What is the retail price of the BrewMaster Pro 3000?

explanation.correct: L'annonce indique « Retail price: $129.99 ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

questions.text: What problem did Jane M. experience with the machine?
options: (C) The keep-warm function stopped earlier than advertised.

explanation.correct: Elle signale que la fonction keep-warm s'arrête après 90 minutes au lieu des 2 heures annoncées.

distractors.A: Elle dit au contraire que le broyeur est excellent.
distractors.B: Elle apprécie la minuterie programmable.
distractors.D: Elle a bien reçu le modèle Silver qu'elle a commandé.

questions.text: In what color did Jane M. purchase the machine?

explanation.correct: Elle indique avoir acheté le modèle « in Silver ».

distractors.A: Black est disponible mais n'est pas la couleur de Jane.
distractors.B: Red est disponible mais n'est pas la couleur de Jane.
distractors.D: White n'est pas une couleur disponible.

questions.text: What advice does Jane M. give to potential buyers?
options: (A) Return the machine if the grinder is noisy.
(B) Check the keep-warm function before the warranty expires.
(D) Choose the Black model for better performance.

explanation.correct: Elle recommande de vérifier le problème du keep-warm avant l'expiration de la garantie de 2 ans.

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Non mentionné — elle l'a achetée en ligne.

documents.title: Order Inquiry — Westfield Office Supplies
documents.text:
From: claire.nguyen@topnotch.com
To: orders@westfieldsupplies.com
Date: September 3
Subject: Order #WF-4821 — Delivery Inquiry

Dear Westfield Team,

I placed order #WF-4821 on August 28 for 10 boxes of copy paper and 5 HP ink cartridges (model 305). Our delivery was scheduled for September 3, but we have not received it.

Could you confirm the status and provide an updated delivery estimate?

Also, please let me know if there are any additional charges we should expect.

Best regards,
Claire Nguyen
Procurement Manager, Topnotch Solutions

documents.title: Invoice #WF-4821
documents.text:
WESTFIELD OFFICE SUPPLIES
Invoice #WF-4821 — Date: August 28
Bill to: Topnotch Solutions, Attn: Claire Nguyen

ITEMS:
• Copy Paper A4 (box × 10) ............. $89.50
• HP Ink Cartridge 305 (× 5) ........... $74.75

Subtotal: $164.25
Shipping: $12.00
Discount (10% loyalty): –$16.43
TOTAL DUE: $159.82

Payment due: September 17
Delivery: September 3–5 (standard shipping)

Thank you for your business!

questions.text: What did Claire Nguyen order?
options: (B) Copy paper and HP ink cartridges

explanation.correct: La commande comprend 10 boîtes de papier copie et 5 cartouches d'encre HP 305.

distractors.A: Des cartouches d'encre, pas du toner; le terme exact est « copy paper ».
distractors.C: Aucune chaise n'est commandée.
distractors.D: Des enveloppes ne sont pas mentionnées.

questions.text: According to the invoice, what is the total amount due?

explanation.correct: La facture indique « TOTAL DUE: $159.82 » après remise de fidélité.

distractors.A: C'est le sous-total avant remise et frais de port.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.
distractors.D: C'est uniquement le prix du papier.

questions.text: Why did Claire Nguyen write the email?
options: (C) To inquire about a delayed delivery

explanation.correct: Elle n'a pas reçu sa livraison prévue pour le 3 septembre et demande une mise à jour.

distractors.A: Elle ne cherche pas à annuler.
distractors.B: Elle ne conteste pas le montant.

questions.text: According to the invoice, what is the delivery window?

explanation.correct: La facture indique « Delivery: September 3–5 (standard shipping) ».

distractors.A: C'est la date de la commande.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

documents.title: Nexatech Expands to European Market
documents.text:
Nexatech, the California-based software firm, announced plans to open a European headquarters in Amsterdam by end of Q3. The expansion follows record revenue of $240 million in the previous fiscal year.

CEO Rachel Moore said: "Europe is a natural next step. We have strong client relationships across the UK, Germany, and France, and Amsterdam provides the talent and infrastructure we need."

The Amsterdam office will initially house 80 employees, with plans to grow to 200 within two years. Nexatech will also host a hiring event in Amsterdam on October 15.

documents.title: European Expansion — Opportunities for Staff
documents.text:
To: All Staff
From: HR Department
Date: October 1
Subject: European Expansion — Relocation Opportunities

As announced, Nexatech is opening its Amsterdam office in Q3. Current employees are encouraged to apply for relocation.

Relocation Package:
• Flight and moving costs covered
• 3-month temporary housing allowance
• €500 settling-in bonus

Interested employees should submit applications to hr@nexatech.com by October 10. Priority will be given to employees with relevant language skills (Dutch, German, or French).

Join us in building something great in Europe!

questions.text: Where will Nexatech open its European headquarters?

explanation.correct: L'article et le mémo indiquent tous deux qu'Amsterdam est le siège européen choisi.

distractors.A: Le Royaume-Uni est mentionné comme marché existant, pas comme siège.
distractors.B: L'Allemagne est mentionnée comme marché.
distractors.C: La France est mentionnée comme marché.

questions.text: What was Nexatech's revenue in the previous fiscal year?

explanation.correct: L'article mentionne « record revenue of $240 million ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: 200 est la cible d'employés, pas le chiffre d'affaires.

questions.text: What is included in the relocation package for staff?

explanation.correct: Le mémo mentionne un « €500 settling-in bonus » parmi les avantages du package.

distractors.A: Le logement temporaire est couvert 3 mois, pas de façon permanente.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.

questions.text: By what date must interested employees apply for relocation?

explanation.correct: Le mémo indique que les candidatures doivent être soumises « by October 10 ».

distractors.A: C'est la date du mémo.
distractors.C: C'est la date de l'événement de recrutement à Amsterdam.
distractors.D: C'est la date prévue d'ouverture du bureau.

documents.title: Leadership Skills Workshop — Register Now
documents.text:
LEADERSHIP SKILLS WORKSHOP
Date: November 8, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Venue: Grandview Conference Center, Room 201
Price: $180/person ($150 for groups of 3+)

Topics:
• Effective communication
• Conflict resolution
• Team motivation and delegation
• Strategic decision-making

Includes: Workbook, lunch, and certificate of completion
Instructor: Dr. Patricia Wells (20 years of corporate training experience)

Register at: leadershipworkshop.com
Deadline: November 1

documents.title: Group Registration — Kairotech
documents.text:
From: paul.martin@kairotech.com
To: info@leadershipworkshop.com
Date: October 28
Subject: Group Registration — 4 Attendees

Hello,

I would like to register four employees: Emma Clarke, David Osei, Nina Patel, and myself (Paul Martin).

Could you confirm:
1. Whether the group discount applies to our registration?
2. If we can pay by company invoice?

Thank you,
Paul Martin, HR Manager, Kairotech

documents.title: Confirmation — Leadership Workshop
documents.text:
From: info@leadershipworkshop.com
To: paul.martin@kairotech.com
Date: October 29
Subject: Re: Group Registration — Confirmed

Dear Mr. Martin,

We confirm 4 spots for your team on November 8.

Your group qualifies for the discounted rate of $150 per person. Total: $600.

Payment by company invoice is accepted. Please send billing details to billing@leadershipworkshop.com.

We look forward to welcoming your team!

Best,
Leadership Workshop Team

questions.text: What is the standard price per person for the workshop?

explanation.correct: L'annonce indique « $180/person » comme tarif standard.

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: C'est le tarif de groupe (3+ personnes).

questions.text: How many people does Paul Martin register for the workshop?

explanation.correct: Il inscrit Emma Clarke, David Osei, Nina Patel et lui-même — 4 personnes.

distractors.A: Non.
distractors.B: Non.

questions.text: What is the total amount Kairotech will pay?

explanation.correct: L'email de confirmation indique « Total: $600 » (4 × $150 tarif de groupe).

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Ce serait 4 × $180 (tarif standard) sans remise.

questions.text: What does the confirmation email say about payment?
options: (A) Payment must be made by credit card.
(B) Payment by company invoice is accepted.
(C) A deposit is required before November 1.
(D) Cash payment is the only option.

explanation.correct: La confirmation indique « Payment by company invoice is accepted ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.

questions.text: What information must Kairotech send to complete the payment process?
options: (A) A list of attendees' job titles

explanation.correct: L'email de confirmation demande d'envoyer les « billing details » à billing@leadershipworkshop.com.

distractors.A: Non demandé.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.

documents.title: New Remote Work Policy — Effective October 1
documents.text:
To: All Department Managers
From: Executive Team
Date: September 5
Subject: Remote Work Policy Update

Starting October 1, all employees must be present in the office at least 3 days per week. The remaining 2 days may be worked remotely.

Exceptions may be granted for medical or caregiving reasons with supporting documentation submitted to your direct manager.

Managers must track team attendance via the updated HR portal. Monthly reports are due on the 5th of each month.

documents.title: Re: Remote Work Policy — Sophie Durand
documents.text:
From: sophie.durand@globalcore.com
To: michael.jones@globalcore.com
Date: September 7
Subject: Re: Remote Work Policy

Hi Michael,

I saw the memo about the new remote policy. I currently care for my elderly mother three mornings per week and was approved for full remote work for that reason.

Does this new policy affect my arrangement? Should I submit a formal exception request?

I can come into the office Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday if needed.

Thanks,
Sophie

documents.title: Team Weekly Schedule — October
documents.text:
TEAM SCHEDULE — OCTOBER

Name          | Mon  | Tue  | Wed  | Thu  | Fri
--------------|------|------|------|------|-----
Michael Jones | OFF  | OFC  | OFC  | OFC  | REM
Sophie Durand | REM  | OFC  | OFC  | OFC  | REM
Liam Torres   | OFC  | OFC  | REM  | OFC  | OFC
Anna Weber    | OFC  | REM  | OFC  | OFC  | REM

OFC = In office  /  REM = Remote  /  OFF = Day off

questions.text: Under the new policy, how many days per week must employees work in the office?

explanation.correct: Le mémo précise « at least 3 days per week » en présentiel.

distractors.A: 2 jours est le nombre de jours de télétravail autorisés.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.
distractors.D: La politique autorise 2 jours de télétravail par semaine.

questions.text: Why is Sophie Durand concerned about the new policy?
options: (A) She lives far from the office.
(B) She cares for her elderly mother three mornings a week.
(C) She has a health condition that requires rest.
(D) She recently started a project requiring full remote work.

explanation.correct: Sophie indique qu'elle s'occupe de sa mère âgée trois matins par semaine.

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Sa raison est le soin familial, pas une condition médicale personnelle.

questions.text: According to the schedule, how many days does Sophie Durand work in the office per week?

explanation.correct: Le planning montre Sophie au bureau mardi, mercredi et jeudi — 3 jours, conforme à la nouvelle politique.

distractors.A: 2 jours correspond à ses jours de télétravail (lundi et vendredi).
distractors.C: Non.

questions.text: When are monthly attendance reports due?
options: (A) The last day of each month

explanation.correct: Le mémo indique « Monthly reports are due on the 5th of each month ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.
distractors.D: Le 1er octobre est la date d'entrée en vigueur de la politique, pas la date de rapport.

questions.text: What does the schedule indicate about Michael Jones on Monday?

explanation.correct: Le planning indique « OFF » pour Michael Jones le lundi.

distractors.A: Non — « OFF » signifie jour de congé, pas télétravail.
distractors.B: Non — « OFC » signifie bureau, mais Michael est « OFF ».

documents.title: IT Support Specialist — Cornerstone Bank
documents.text:
Cornerstone Bank is hiring an IT Support Specialist for our downtown branch.

Key responsibilities:
• Provide technical support to 150+ staff
• Maintain hardware, software, and network systems
• Document incidents in our ticketing system
• Liaise with external vendors for equipment upgrades

Requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in IT or Computer Science
• 3+ years of IT support experience
• CompTIA A+ certification required
• Experience with Windows 10/11 and Microsoft 365

Salary: $52,000–$60,000
Apply to: it-hr@cornerstonebank.com

documents.title: Application — Oliver Park
documents.text:
From: oliver.park@email.com
To: it-hr@cornerstonebank.com
Date: January 12
Subject: IT Support Specialist Application

Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the IT Support Specialist role. I have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and four years of IT support experience in a financial services environment.

I hold CompTIA A+ and Network+ certifications. At Orion Financial, I support over 200 employees and reduced ticket resolution time by 35% through process improvements.

I am proficient in Windows 10/11 and Microsoft 365 and have experience coordinating with hardware vendors.

Please find my resume attached. Thank you.

Oliver Park

documents.title: Reference Letter — Orion Financial
documents.text:
January 10

To Whom It May Concern,

I am pleased to recommend Oliver Park for the IT Support Specialist position. Oliver has been a valued member of our IT team at Orion Financial for the past four years.

He consistently demonstrates outstanding technical skills and a patient, professional manner with non-technical colleagues. His initiative in redesigning our help desk workflows resulted in a 35% reduction in average ticket resolution time.

Oliver is reliable, detail-oriented, and a team player. I recommend him without reservation.

Sincerely,
Diana Walsh, IT Manager, Orion Financial

questions.text: What certification is required for the IT Support Specialist position?

explanation.correct: L'offre d'emploi précise « CompTIA A+ certification required ».

distractors.A: Oliver possède cette certification mais elle n'est pas exigée dans l'offre.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

questions.text: How many employees does Oliver Park currently support at Orion Financial?

explanation.correct: Oliver indique qu'il supporte « over 200 employees » dans son rôle actuel.

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: 150+ est le nombre d'employés de Cornerstone Bank, pas d'Orion Financial.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.

questions.text: What improvement did Oliver Park make at Orion Financial?
options: (A) He implemented a new software system.
(B) He reduced ticket resolution time by 35%.

explanation.correct: Son email et la lettre de recommandation confirment une réduction de 35% du temps de résolution des tickets.

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Il coordonne avec des fournisseurs mais cela n'est pas son amélioration principale.

questions.text: What does Diana Walsh say about Oliver Park?
options: (A) He needs to improve his communication skills.
(B) He has been at Orion Financial for two years.
(D) He recently completed his Bachelor's degree.

explanation.correct: La lettre de recommandation décrit Oliver comme « reliable, detail-oriented, and a team player ».

distractors.A: Au contraire, elle mentionne ses compétences relationnelles avec des collègues non techniques.
distractors.B: Il est chez Orion Financial depuis 4 ans, pas 2.
distractors.D: Son diplôme est mentionné dans son email, pas dans la lettre.

questions.text: Which statement about Oliver Park's qualifications is TRUE?
options: (A) He does not have the required experience.
(D) He has no experience in financial services.

explanation.correct: L'offre exige 3+ ans d'expérience; Oliver en a 4. Il dépasse donc l'exigence minimale.

distractors.A: Il a 4 ans d'expérience, soit plus que les 3 requis.
distractors.C: Il possède CompTIA A+ (et Network+ en plus).
distractors.D: Son expérience actuelle est dans les services financiers (Orion Financial).

documents.title: Annual Company Picnic — July 20
documents.text:
HALCYON INDUSTRIES — ANNUAL COMPANY PICNIC
Date: Saturday, July 20, 11:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Location: Riverside Park, Pavilion B

Join us for a day of fun, food, and team spirit!

Activities:
• BBQ lunch (vegetarian options available)
• Volleyball and relay races
• Kids' zone (for employees with children)
• Door prizes and raffle

Attendance is free. RSVPs required by July 10.
Bring your family and friends!

Contact: events@halcyon.com

documents.title: RSVP — Mark Lawson
documents.text:
From: mark.lawson@halcyon.com
To: events@halcyon.com
Date: July 7
Subject: Picnic RSVP — Attending

Hi,

Happy to confirm attendance for July 20. I'll be bringing my partner and our two children (ages 6 and 8).

Could you let me know if volleyball is a tournament or casual play? My partner is keen to join if it's competitive.

Also, are there gluten-free options in addition to vegetarian?

Thank you,
Mark Lawson

documents.title: Re: Picnic RSVP — Halcyon Events
documents.text:
From: events@halcyon.com
To: mark.lawson@halcyon.com
Date: July 8
Subject: Re: Picnic RSVP — Confirmed!

Hi Mark,

Great — we've registered you, your partner, and your two children!

Volleyball will be a friendly tournament — teams of 6. Your partner is welcome to sign up on the day.

Regarding food: yes, we will have gluten-free options labeled at the buffet. Please mention it when you arrive so the catering team can assist.

See you on the 20th!

Events Team, Halcyon Industries

questions.text: Where will the company picnic take place?

explanation.correct: L'avis indique « Riverside Park, Pavilion B ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.

questions.text: By what date must employees RSVP for the picnic?

explanation.correct: L'avis indique « RSVPs required by July 10 ».

distractors.A: C'est la date à laquelle Mark a envoyé son RSVP.
distractors.B: C'est la date de la réponse de l'équipe événementielle.
distractors.D: C'est la date du pique-nique lui-même.

questions.text: How many people from the Lawson family will attend the picnic?

explanation.correct: Mark, son partenaire et leurs deux enfants = 4 personnes.

distractors.A: Seulement Mark et son partenaire, sans les enfants.
distractors.B: Mark, son partenaire et un seul enfant.
distractors.D: Il n'y a que 4 membres dans la famille mentionnés.

questions.text: How will the volleyball be organized at the picnic?
options: (A) As a casual game with no fixed teams
(B) As a formal league over multiple weeks
(C) As a friendly tournament with teams of 6

explanation.correct: L'email de réponse précise « a friendly tournament — teams of 6 ».

distractors.A: Ce n'est pas du jeu libre — il y a un format tournoi.
distractors.B: Il s'agit d'un seul événement, pas d'une ligue.
distractors.D: Le format est en équipes, pas individuel.

questions.text: What should Mark do to ensure gluten-free food is available for his family?
options: (B) Fill out a dietary form before July 10
(C) Mention it to the catering team upon arrival
(D) Bring his own food to the picnic

explanation.correct: L'email de réponse indique « Please mention it when you arrive so the catering team can assist ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: Non demandé dans les emails.

documents.title: EcoWrap Launches Biodegradable Packaging Line
documents.text:
EcoWrap, a sustainable packaging startup based in Vancouver, has launched its fully biodegradable packaging line — GreenSeal. Made from plant-based materials, GreenSeal decomposes within 90 days in standard composting conditions.

CEO Fiona Marsh said: "GreenSeal is our answer to the global packaging waste crisis. We've been developing this for three years and are proud to bring it to market."

EcoWrap targets food and beverage companies and has already secured contracts with two regional grocery chains. The product comes in five sizes starting at $0.08 per unit.

documents.title: Partnership Inquiry — GreenCycle Distributors
documents.text:
GreenCycle Distributors
88 Harbor Drive, Seattle

November 5

Dear Ms. Marsh,

We read about EcoWrap's GreenSeal launch with great interest. GreenCycle specializes in distributing eco-friendly products across the Pacific Northwest and currently works with 300+ retailers in Washington, Oregon, and Idaho.

We believe GreenSeal would be an excellent addition to our catalog. Could we schedule a call this month to discuss a potential distribution partnership?

Best regards,
Thomas Reid, Partnership Director, GreenCycle Distributors

documents.title: Re: Partnership Inquiry — EcoWrap
documents.text:
From: fiona.marsh@ecowrap.com
To: thomas.reid@greencycle.com
Date: November 8
Subject: Re: GreenSeal Partnership

Dear Thomas,

Thank you for reaching out! We are very interested in partnering with GreenCycle.

We have distribution capacity for up to 500,000 units per month and are actively expanding. A partnership with your 300+ retailer network would be a significant step for us.

I am available for a call on November 14 or 18. Could you confirm which date works best?

Best regards,
Fiona Marsh, CEO, EcoWrap

questions.text: What is GreenSeal made from?

explanation.correct: L'article précise que GreenSeal est fabriqué à partir de « plant-based materials ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Non mentionné.

questions.text: How long has EcoWrap been developing GreenSeal?

explanation.correct: La PDG dit « We've been developing this for three years ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

questions.text: In how many states does GreenCycle Distributors operate?

explanation.correct: GreenCycle opère dans Washington, Oregon et Idaho — 3 États.

distractors.A: Non.
distractors.C: Non.

questions.text: What dates does Fiona Marsh propose for a call?

explanation.correct: Son email propose « November 14 or 18 ».

distractors.A: Ce sont les dates de la lettre et de l'email.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

questions.text: What can be inferred about EcoWrap's current production capacity?
options: (A) It cannot meet large retail demand.
(B) It can distribute up to 500,000 units per month.
(C) It is currently operating at full capacity.
(D) It produces 1 million units per month.

explanation.correct: Fiona Marsh indique « distribution capacity for up to 500,000 units per month ».

distractors.A: Au contraire, ils ont une capacité importante et cherchent à se développer.
distractors.C: Non mentionné — ils sont « actively expanding ».

documents.title: The Blue Spoon — Lunch Menu
documents.text:
THE BLUE SPOON
Lunch — Monday to Friday, 11:30 AM – 2:30 PM

STARTERS
• Garden Salad ............... $7
• French Onion Soup .......... $9

MAINS
• Grilled Salmon ............. $22  [GF]
• Mushroom Risotto ........... $18  [V, GF]
• Chicken Sandwich ........... $15
• Daily Pasta Special ........ $17

DESSERTS
• Chocolate Lava Cake ........ $8
• Seasonal Fruit Sorbet ...... $6  [V, GF]

[V] = Vegetarian  /  [GF] = Gluten-Free
Group discount: 10% for parties of 8 or more.
Reservations recommended.

documents.title: Online Review — TripAdvisor
documents.text:
★★★★★ (5/5)
Reviewer: Rachel T. — Visited October 14

We had a wonderful business lunch at The Blue Spoon. The Grilled Salmon was perfectly cooked — light and flavorful. Our group of 10 appreciated the 10% group discount, which made the bill much more manageable.

Service was attentive and the ambiance is ideal for a professional setting. Only minor note: the daily pasta was sold out by 1:30 PM.

Will definitely return for our next team lunch!

documents.title: Reservation Request — Dan Foster
documents.text:
From: dan.foster@reachventures.com
To: reservations@bluespoon.com
Date: October 20
Subject: Lunch Reservation — October 28

Hello,

I'd like to book a table for 9 people on Tuesday, October 28, at 12:30 PM.

Two members of our group have gluten intolerance. Could you confirm which dishes are gluten-free?

Also, does the 10% group discount apply to our reservation?

Thank you,
Dan Foster, Reach Ventures

questions.text: What is the price of the Mushroom Risotto?

explanation.correct: Le menu indique « Mushroom Risotto ... $18 ».

distractors.A: C'est le prix du Chicken Sandwich.
distractors.B: C'est le prix du Daily Pasta Special.
distractors.D: C'est le prix du Grilled Salmon.

questions.text: What minor problem did Rachel T. mention in her review?
options: (C) The daily pasta was sold out early.
(D) The group discount was not applied.

explanation.correct: L'avis indique que « the daily pasta was sold out by 1:30 PM ».

distractors.A: L'avis dit que le service était attentif.
distractors.B: Le saumon est décrit comme parfaitement cuit.
distractors.D: La remise de groupe a bien été appliquée.

questions.text: Will Dan Foster's group qualify for the group discount?
options: (A) No, they need at least 10 people.
(C) No, the discount only applies on weekends.
(D) Yes, but only for the prix-fixe menu.

explanation.correct: Le menu indique une remise de 10% pour les groupes de 8 personnes ou plus. Avec 9 personnes, ils sont éligibles.

distractors.A: Il faut 8+ personnes, pas 10.
distractors.C: Aucune restriction au week-end n'est mentionnée.

questions.text: Which dishes on the menu are gluten-free?
options: (A) Grilled Salmon, Garden Salad, and Chicken Sandwich
(B) Mushroom Risotto, Grilled Salmon, and Seasonal Fruit Sorbet
(C) French Onion Soup, Mushroom Risotto, and Seasonal Fruit Sorbet
(D) Daily Pasta Special and Chocolate Lava Cake

explanation.correct: Les plats marqués [GF] sont : Grilled Salmon, Mushroom Risotto et Seasonal Fruit Sorbet.

distractors.A: La Garden Salad et le Chicken Sandwich ne sont pas marqués [GF].
distractors.C: La French Onion Soup n'est pas marquée [GF].
distractors.D: Le Daily Pasta Special et le Chocolate Lava Cake ne sont pas [GF].

questions.text: What can be inferred from the review about Rachel T.'s group?
options: (C) They qualified for the group discount.
(D) They ordered the daily pasta special.

explanation.correct: Le groupe de Rachel comptait 10 personnes et a bénéficié de la remise de 10%, comme elle le mentionne.

distractors.A: Le groupe était de 10, pas 8.
distractors.B: La pâte étant épuisée avant 13h30 ne signifie pas qu'ils sont arrivés après.
distractors.D: La pâte était épuisée — ils ne l'ont pas nécessairement commandée.

documents.title: Updated PTO Request Policy
documents.text:
To: All Staff
From: Human Resources
Date: December 1
Subject: Updated Paid Time Off (PTO) Request Process

Effective December 15, all PTO requests must be submitted at least 10 business days in advance through the HR portal.

Key changes:
• Requests under 3 days: approved by your direct manager
• Requests of 3 days or more: require VP-level approval
• Blackout dates (December 22 – January 3): no PTO approved unless pre-existing medical documentation is provided

For questions: hr@globalcorp.com

documents.title: PTO Request — Kevin Yuen
documents.text:
PTO REQUEST — GlobalCorp HR Portal
Submitted: December 5
Employee: Kevin Yuen, Sales Team
Manager: Sandra Hill

Requested dates: December 29 – January 2 (5 business days)
Reason: Family vacation

Note: I understand this falls within the blackout period. However, the flights were booked before the new policy was announced.

Status: Pending review

documents.title: Re: PTO Request — HR Team
documents.text:
From: hr@globalcorp.com
To: kevin.yuen@globalcorp.com
Date: December 7
Subject: Re: PTO Request — December 29 – January 2

Dear Kevin,

Thank you for submitting your request. We have reviewed your situation.

Your request falls within the blackout period and covers 5 days, requiring VP-level approval. We have forwarded your request to VP Mark Thornton for review.

Please note that without documented medical reasons, approval is not guaranteed. Mr. Thornton's decision will be communicated to you by December 12.

Kind regards,
HR Team, GlobalCorp

questions.text: How many business days in advance must employees submit PTO requests?

explanation.correct: Le mémo indique « at least 10 business days in advance ».

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.B: Non mentionné.

questions.text: Who must approve PTO requests of 3 days or more?

explanation.correct: Le mémo stipule « Requests of 3 days or more: require VP-level approval ».

distractors.A: Les demandes de moins de 3 jours peuvent être approuvées par le manager direct.
distractors.B: Les RH transmettent la demande mais n'ont pas le pouvoir d'approbation pour les congés longs.

questions.text: Why is Kevin Yuen's request forwarded to VP Mark Thornton?
options: (B) His request falls within the blackout period and covers 5 days.
(C) He submitted the request too late.
(D) He did not provide a reason for the leave.

explanation.correct: La demande couvre 5 jours (≥ 3) ET tombe dans la période de fermeture, nécessitant l'approbation du VP.

distractors.A: Non mentionné.
distractors.C: Il a soumis le 5 décembre pour un départ le 29 décembre — plus de 10 jours ouvrables.
distractors.D: Il a indiqué « Family vacation » comme raison.

questions.text: What is Kevin Yuen's concern about the blackout period?
options: (A) He is unaware of the blackout policy.
(B) His flights were booked before the policy was announced.
(C) He has a medical need that requires travel.
(D) His manager already approved his leave verbally.

explanation.correct: Kevin note que ses vols ont été réservés avant l'annonce de la nouvelle politique.

distractors.A: Il est au courant — il le mentionne explicitement dans le formulaire.
distractors.C: La raison est les vacances en famille, pas médicale.

questions.text: When will Kevin Yuen receive the VP's decision?

explanation.correct: L'email des RH précise que la décision sera communiquée « by December 12 ».

distractors.A: C'est la date de soumission du formulaire.
distractors.B: C'est la date de l'email des RH.
distractors.D: C'est la date d'entrée en vigueur de la nouvelle politique.
